title: How a Godly Man Kills the Sin He's Learned to Live With
caption:
You didn't quit the sin. You just got good at managing it. Built rules around it. Learned its schedule. Called that maturity.

But managing isn't killing. The tab you keep half closed, the way you talk to her when you're tired, the scroll at 1 AM you've stopped even pretending to fight, none of it is gone. It's just tamed enough to live with.

Scripture doesn't tell you to negotiate with sin. It tells you to put it to death. Name what you're actually dealing with, not the vague version. Tell one man the truth about it. Cut the access point tonight, not just the intention. Put something demanding in its place.

"For if you live according to the flesh you will die, but if by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live." — Romans 8:13

Managed sin negotiates. Killed sin is over.

#faith #sin #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
